scripts.pack: node_modules/.bin/fvtt package pack --id naruto-d20 --type Module --compendiumName techniques --in packs/_source/techniques --out packs
scripts.pack:buffs: node_modules/.bin/fvtt package pack --id naruto-d20 --type Module --compendiumName technique-buffs --in packs/_source/technique-buffs --out packs
scripts.pack:feats: node_modules/.bin/fvtt package pack --id naruto-d20 --type Module --compendiumName feats --in packs/_source/feats --out packs
scripts.pack:all: npm run pack && npm run pack:buffs && npm run pack:feats
scripts.unpack: node_modules/.bin/fvtt package unpack --id naruto-d20 --type Module --compendiumName techniques --in packs --out packs/_source/techniques
